PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. CAMELIA CITY MILL WORK, INC. $57,058.10 PRINCIPAL, $637.50 ATTORNEY FEES, $553.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $58,249.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
